chain.thought: Explanation: France is the only country with rank 1 in the table, indicating it placed first; no other country has rank 1.

judge_thought: Explanation: "Placed first" corresponds to gold medals. France has the highest number of gold medals (11), more than any other country listed (Greece 6, Yugoslavia 3, Spain 1, Morocco 1, Turkey 1, Egypt 0, Tunisia 0). Therefore, France placed first the most.
